text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Three days remain until Operation Oversight is
implemented.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Nutritional penalty drinks? What's that?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Hm... It says, "Under Operation Oversight, all
students are required to record the nutritional
content of everything they eat each day."

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: If a student consumes too much or too little...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
All their meals of the following day will be
replaced with 'penalty drinks,' a beverage that is
incredibly bitter but nutritionally dense...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Nooooo!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Wait, we'll have to take a quiz in each class every day after Operation Oversight starts?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
A-and if you flunk them, you have to take extra
classes on the weekend... Ohhh, the stars are so
unaligned right now!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Wait! In times like these, I should go recharge my
powers at my secret sacred site!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but wait... Now we have to fill out permission
slips to go out, and I'd have to specify where I'm
going "for my safety"...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: NOOOOO!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
This doesn't make any dang sense! Now school's
all sad an' depressin'!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I prefer it when we were happy an' free to do
whatever we wanted!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The other students nod their assent at Taiki
Shuttle's impassioned outburst.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
There' nothin' for it. Let's go have a li'l word with
Ms. Kashimoto!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I happen to be passing by the director's office
when I see Taiki Shuttle with a group of students,
all arguing with Ms. Kashimoto.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: We the students are against Operation Oversight!

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
How many times must I repeat myself? I will not
change my decision.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
B-but... I hate seein' everyone at school so down
in the dumps!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Things were way better back when we could all
have ice cream for a midnight snack and enjoy
tasty foods without worryin' 'bout nothin'!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
And having quizzes every day is just too much! It's
worse than torture!

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
You students are so persistent, coming to bother
me every day... Do you have any idea how many
of you have come to complain to me today?

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
And it's always the same indulgent requests. To
respect your "independence" or reinstate the
Unity Cup... How tiresome.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
That said, I can hardly expect the new system to
yield results while this dogged resistance
continues. As such...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Students, I propose a small wager with you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The challenge Ms. Kashimoto suggests sends
shockwaves throughout the student body.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
To defeat a team trained by Ms. Kashimoto in the
Unity Cup...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I shall put my decision to ban the Unity Cup on
hold for now.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Furthermore, I shall refrain from enforcing
Operation Oversight until the Unity Cup is over.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Strive to defeat Team Zenith, a team I will be assembling and personally training with my methods, in the Unity Cup.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
If you succeed in this task, I will call off
Operation Oversight.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
If you fail, however, then I shall proceed with the
implementation of my new system accordingly.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
These are quite generous terms, don't you agree?
All you need to do is win, thereby proving that
your methods truly are superior to mine.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
...But if the students can't defeat Ms. Kashimoto's
team, she will have proven that her methods were
right all along.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
This must be her way of silencing any arguments
against her ironfisted management once and for
all...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Umamusume Ms. Kashimoto selects after
making her announcement are truly elite runners.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One of them is Bitter Glasse, a fiendishly strong
Umamusume who loves competition. She often
talks about the importance of being gutsy.

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text: All right, that's a good weight! Time to gooo!

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text: Guts! Glory! And gumptiooon!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Passerby
text_block_list.text: What's with her?! How is she able to sprint while dragging that massive tire behind her?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Also among their number is Little Cocon, a
cynical Umamusume whose lung capacity is truly
unparallelled.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: Hm? Wait, I've heard of her before...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry about her. Your break is over in five
minutes, so hurry to the pool.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: Yes, ma'am.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With these two standout athletes at its forefront,
Ms. Kashimoto puts together a team of
exceptional racers who agree with her totalitarian
management methods.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the brief period since Director Akikawa
announced her temporary leave of absence,
Tracen Academy has already descended into
chaos.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I got in touch with Director Akikawa, but it seems
she's too busy to return for the time being.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
There's one other thing, though... She also said
that it's too early to consider this a crisis.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Director Akikawa knows the academy better than
anyone, so she can probably see things others
can't.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
If she doesn't think things are dire, then let's just
do what we can do here on our own.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Whatever the circumstances, Ms. Kashimoto's
methods are far too overbearing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't simply sit back and watch as she snatches
away all the freedoms the students have enjoyed.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
This stays between us and is strictly off the
record, but... please win this, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I agree that some oversight is necessary for the
students. It would be irresponsible if they incurred
injuries or illness due to lack of supervision...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
But I cannot in good conscience approve of Ms.
Kashimoto's overly restrictive and repressive
methods.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I much prefer seeing Tracen Academy filled with
beaming faces than tension.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tazuna smiles at me, and I give her an
encouraging nod in response.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
First things first, I need to assemble a team. Then,
we'll have to work together to defeat Team
Zenith!
